_comment: Ground truth annotation — CONSORT checklist for RECOVERY Collaborative Group 2021

article.title: Dexamethasone in Hospitalized Patients with Covid-19

study_type.notes: Controlled, open-label, randomized trial (RECOVERY). 2:1 randomization, Web-based with concealment.

1a.notes: Title: 'Dexamethasone in Hospitalized Patients with Covid-19' — identifies intervention and population

1b.notes: Structured abstract with Background, Methods, Results, Conclusions

2a.notes: Introduction covers glucocorticoid rationale, inflammation in Covid-19, lack of evidence

2b.notes: Objective: evaluate effect of dexamethasone on 28-day mortality

3b.notes: Protocol changes mentioned (age limit removed May 9, 2020) but not as formal protocol amendments

4a.notes: Eligibility: hospitalized Covid-19, clinically suspected or lab-confirmed, no contraindication

4b.notes: 176 NHS hospitals in the United Kingdom

5.notes: Dexamethasone 6mg once daily oral/IV for up to 10 days vs usual care

6a.notes: Primary outcome: all-cause mortality within 28 days. Secondary outcomes: discharge, ventilation

6b.notes: No mention of changes to outcomes after trial commenced

7a.notes: Power calculation: 2000 dexa + 4000 control gives 90% power at P=0.01 to detect 20% reduction

7b.notes: Steering committee monitored data, closed recruitment June 8 2020 when >2000 enrolled

8a.notes: Web-based randomization system with concealment of group assignment

8b.notes: Unstratified randomization (mentioned: 'through the play of chance in the unstratified randomization')

10.notes: Local trial staff enrolled, Web-based system assigned

11a.notes: Open-label: patients and local members of trial staff were aware of assignments

11b.notes: No description of similarity of interventions (open-label, no placebo)

12a.notes: Cox regression for hazard ratio, Kaplan-Meier survival curves, log-binomial regression, chi-square tests

12b.notes: Prespecified subgroup analyses by age, sex, race, respiratory support, days since symptom onset

13a.notes: Figure 1: CONSORT flow diagram with enrollment, randomization, allocation, analysis

13b.notes: Reasons for exclusion: 1948 excluded (357 no drug, 1707 not suitable)

14b.notes: Trial stopped by steering committee when enrollment exceeded 2000 in dexa group

15.notes: Table 1: detailed baseline characteristics by treatment group and respiratory support level

16.notes: All analyses intention-to-treat: all 2104 dexa and 4321 usual care included

17b.notes: Age-adjusted absolute reductions reported: 12.3 percentage points for ventilated, 4.2 for oxygen

18.notes: Subgroup analyses by respiratory support (Figure 3), sensitivity analyses without age adjustment (Table S3)

19.notes: 4 serious adverse reactions: 2 hyperglycemia, 1 GI hemorrhage, 1 psychosis

20.notes: Extensive limitations: open-label, no physiologic/virologic measures, only essential data collected

21.notes: Generalizability discussed: ~10% of UK hospitalized Covid-19 patients, mortality consistent with national data

22.notes: Discussion of findings in context of prior evidence, cautious interpretation for non-oxygen patients

24.notes: Protocol available at NEJM.org and www.recoverytrial.net

25.notes: Funded by MRC, NIHR, Wellcome, Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation; funders had no role in analysis/publication
